name: One Minute Revelry
description: 30 aerial shots that build to a dazzling finale — colorful bursts rise into drooping golden waterfall effects, then finish with a sparkling crown of red and silver. A great starter show that packs a real punch.

name: Firefly
description: 16 big colorful explosions bursting with red and silver flower effects, brilliant blue stars, and crackling finishes. Short, punchy, and incredibly satisfying.

name: Band of Brothers
description: 12 elegant shots that cycle through red, white, and blue — then purple and green — then green and blue — each one fading gracefully into brilliant white. Smooth, colorful, and eye-catching.

name: Sky Diving
description: Colorful trails rise and bloom into parachute-shaped bursts in 5 vivid colors, then finish with 5 rapid-fire shots the whole crowd will love. A fun, one-of-a-kind effect you won't see everywhere.

name: Friday Night Frenzy
description: A colorful parade of spinning gold and silver bursts cycling through blue, red, green, orange, and teal — finished with a crackling silver finale and brilliant red flower bursts. Non-stop variety from start to finish.

name: Willow Explosion
description: 24 rapid-fire shots that explode into massive drooping golden showers — like giant weeping willow trees in the sky — each one raining brilliant blue stars as it falls. Fast, beautiful, and always a crowd-pleaser.

name: 2 Minutes Extravaganza
description: 63 shots and nearly 2 full minutes of non-stop aerial action — colorful bursts, golden glitter showers, crackling rain effects, and a rapid-fire finale to close it out. Our best bang for your buck.

name: Voice of Monster
description: 24 massive shots that shake the sky with earth-rattling booms and enormous bursts. Intense, loud, and impossible to ignore — this one makes the whole neighborhood look up.

name: Something Red White and Blue
description: 34 patriotic shots with sparkling silver trails, red and blue shooting stars, and glowing bursts in American colors. Perfect for the Fourth of July or any celebration worth doing right.

name: Steel Navy
description: 78 shots fired in a sweeping Z-pattern — colorful flower-shaped bursts, white glitter explosions, and crackling red and green trails all building to a dramatic purple and green rain finale. One of our longest shows.

name: Whacky Tobacky
description: 9 sky-filling shots that launch massive golden sparkle bursts high into the air, each one raining glittering pink and red sparks from the center. Big, booming, and built to close the show.

name: Ghost Killer
description: 9 massive bursts that slowly shift through hauntingly beautiful colors — warm peach, emerald green, and ocean blue — each one fading into the next for a mesmerizing 35–40 second sky show.

name: Double Down
description: 9 massive shots that explode into enormous rings of fire — golden sparkling rings, glittering rings, and bold color rings with a bright red center. Layered, dramatic, and impossible to ignore.

name: Midnight
description: Our biggest show in a single box — 204 shots with sweeping star formations, crackling comet trails, colorful bursts, and whistling rockets that build for nearly 3 minutes before detonating in a thundering silver finale.

name: Classic Canisters
description: A premium reloadable shell kit with 5-, 6-, and 7-inch shells that blast high into the sky and explode into massive multicolored bursts. Load one at a time for the biggest aerial effects you can get.

name: Monster 5 Inch Canister Shells
description: 24 powerful 5-inch reloadable shells that blast high into the sky with massive colorful explosions and earth-shaking booms. Load one at a time for maximum impact every single shot.

name: Ameri-Cannons
description: 24 reloadable shells with massive high-altitude explosions and a bold patriotic look. Hard-hitting bursts that fill the sky one powerful shot at a time — perfect alongside a cake show.

name: Super Sized
description: A big ground fountain that pours out golden sparks, colored stars, and dense crackling effects for a dazzling close-up show. Great placed in front of aerial items to fill the whole scene.

name: Seal the Deal
description: Ground fountain that sprays silver crackles, red and blue stars, and cascading gold and blue sparkle showers. Beautiful up close and a great addition alongside any show.

name: 3 Minute
description: A full 3 minutes of sparkling ground fountain effects — cycling through silver, red, white, green, and blue with crackling bursts throughout. Incredible value for how long it lasts.

name: Snake Pit
description: 12 aerial shots that launch with crackling trails and burst into purple, aqua-blue, and silver explosions, finishing with a rapid wave of red glitter and crackle. Great mid-range filler for any show.

name: Pirate Captain
description: 21 aerial shots bursting with gold, silver, and red star effects, bright color bursts, and shimmering trails. A fun variety of effects in one box — a great crowd-pleaser at any price.

name: Wild One
description: 9 shots that launch with crackling blue trails and burst into alternating crackle and color-flashing star explosions. Bold, fast, and a lot of fun for the price.

name: Hulking Hurler
description: 16 big multicolor aerial bursts that punch way above their weight — impressive effects that look and feel like a much bigger firework. One of the best values on the table.

name: Neon Show
description: 16 brilliant aerial shots that burst into bright silver flower explosions and transition through red, green, sky blue, yellow, and purple stars with silver glitter. Eye-catching color variety in every shot.

name: Poker Party
description: 16 aerial shots with sparkling golden crowns, drooping golden showers, colorful shooting tails, and flashing white strobe effects. A fun mix of effects that keeps everyone watching.

name: Military Paratrooper
description: Shoots a toy soldier high into the air on a crackling trail, then watch it float back down on a parachute. The soldier has movable head, arms, and legs — kids absolutely love it.

name: Naughty Gnomes
description: A cone-shaped ground fountain with bold sparkling action, a whistling effect, and a crackling finish. Great budget add-on and the fun packaging makes it a crowd favorite with kids.

name: Sky Prince
description: Shoots a prince figure high into the air then watch it float back down on a colorful parachute. A fun novelty the whole family enjoys — great for kids to pick out themselves.

name: Sky Princess
description: Shoots a princess figure high into the air then watch it float back down on a colorful parachute. A fun novelty the whole family enjoys — great for kids to pick out themselves.

name: Dino Landing
description: A daytime novelty that shoots up and floats back down on a parachute with a colorful smoke trail and a small dinosaur figure attached. Perfect for kids and a great daytime activity.

name: Super Dragon
description: Dragon-themed ground fountain with colorful sparkling sprays, bright flashing effects, and vivid star bursts. A fun, safe, family-friendly pick that kids love to watch up close.

name: Go Bananas
description: Monkey-themed fountain that starts with a bright red flame, erupts into colorful flower sparks and glitter, then finishes with cascading silver rain and a loud crackling finale. Fun, loud, and great for the price.

name: TNT Backpack Assortment
description: A grab-and-go backpack packed with an assorted mix of TNT ground items and novelties. Perfect for families who want a variety of fun without picking individual items — everything you need in one bag.

name: Sword Master
description: A sword-shaped novelty fountain that shoots sparkling effects right from the tip. Bold, dramatic, and a crowd favorite — a fun prop that doubles as a real firework.

name: 2nd Amendment
description: A patriotic-themed ground fountain from Top Gun Fireworks that bursts with red, white, and blue sparkling effects, silver crackling showers, and a bold star-filled finale. A great salute to American pride.

name: Ladybug
description: A ladybug-themed spinner that spins wildly on the ground with a whistling effect, then launches itself into the air and bursts into red or green stars. Inexpensive, surprising, and always gets a reaction.

name: Danger Zone
description: Two-pack of handheld smoke sticks — one red and one orange — that pour out bold, vivid color smoke. Perfect for daytime celebrations, photos, and parties.

name: M-45 Tank
description: A classic ground-based novelty by Brothers Pyrotechnics that propels itself back and forth along the ground, letting out a loud 2-stage whistle as it moves, then finishes with a final bang. Kids love chasing it.

name: Mighty Max Rocket
description: Four-pack of 32-inch high-flying stick rockets that leave a dazzling trail and break high in the sky.

name: Red Devil 80/16 Firecrackers
description: Red Devil super firecrackers built for loud, fast crackling reports. A classic firecracker pack for anyone who loves noise — bold, sharp, and satisfying.

name: Mad Dog Roll of 1000
description: A full roll of 1,000 connected firecrackers that unleash a long, rapid chain of sharp crackling reports. Perfect for making a big entrance or closing out a show with a bang.

name: Ground Blasters
description: A box of single crackers that each pack a loud punch. TNT-made, waterproof, and built for noise — a great budget pick for anyone who loves a big bang.
